His core expertise is in innovation management, business strategy and ecosystem building. He is also an educator in the domain of innovation and entrepreneurship. Poyni Bhatt is a founding team member and former CEO of SINE, the technology business incubator at IIT Bombay. She has mentored more than 250 startups within and outside SINE. She has also contributed to various central and state government departments in shaping their entrepreneurship programs. She is an Advisor- Knowledge and Resource Centre of Indian STEP & Business Incubator Association. A qualified legal and compliance professional, she has an experience of nearly three decades in industry and academia. Prof. Rohan Chinchwadkar is an Assistant Professor of Finance at the Shailesh J.
